scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 non-partitioned legacy-parity read streams; the symbol-partitioned market_news stream is blocked (ENGINE_GAP: no fan-out/partition mechanism in the declarative dialect); the full Finage surface (real-time quotes, forex, crypto, per-symbol fundamentals) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: legacy fans this stream out across the configured symbols config list (one request per symbol), which the declarative dialect's stream.path/query has no mechanism to express (a stream resolves exactly one request path per pagination page, not N independent requests driven by a runtime config list); see docs.md Known limits and this bundle's reported blocker
